# Plain pip deps for pimm. Installed AFTER torch (see common/install_torch.sh).
# NOT here:
#   - torch, torchvision                 (install_torch.sh)
#   - torch_scatter, torch_sparse, torch_cluster, spconv   (requirements-cuda.txt)
#   - flash-attn                         (install_flash_attn.sh)
#   - local libs/* CUDA extensions       (install_cuda_exts.sh)
#

h5py
tensorboardx
wandb
yapf
addict
einops
termcolor
matplotlib
scikit-learn
nvidia-ml-py
rich
pandas
huggingface_hub
safetensors
pyyaml
timm
regex
torchdata
submitit
tyro
ninja
torch-geometric
